name: gpts-queue
description: Send local chapter files to a custom GPTS queue and save replies locally.

scripts.pipeline: npm run chai && npm run xie
scripts.pipeline:dry: npm run chai:dry && npm run xie:dry
scripts.check: node --check gpts-queue.mjs && node --check queue-lock.mjs && node --check control.mjs && node --check local-ui.mjs && node --check ui/app.js && node --check fanqie-control.mjs && node --check material-control.mjs && node --check lib/queue/config.mjs && node --check lib/queue/page-errors.mjs && node --check lib/control/status.mjs && node --check lib/queue-state.mjs && node --check lib/assistant-text.mjs && node --check lib/chapter-title.mjs && node --check lib/book-catalog.mjs && node --check lib/task-scope.mjs && node --check lib/conversation-registry.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-config.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-browser.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-lock.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-state.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-evidence.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-service.mjs && node --check lib/fanqie-page-contract.mjs && node --check lib/external-resources.mjs && node --check lib/material-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/restore-original-titles.mjs && node --check scripts/create-book-config.mjs && node --check scripts/bind-fanqie.mjs && node --check scripts/import-external-resources.mjs
